fields.label: Application Key ID
fields.helpText: From Backblaze -> App Keys -> Add a New Application Key

fields.label: Application Key
fields.helpText: Shown once when creating the key -- copy immediately

healthcheck_config.description: Validates credentials via B2 authorize_account endpoint

metadata.summary: Backblaze B2 affordable S3-compatible cloud object storage for backups, archives, and media.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Backblaze.
2. Go to App Keys.
3. Click 'Add a New Application Key'.
4. Name it and select bucket permissions.
5. Copy the Application Key ID and Application Key (shown only once).
6. Paste both values here.
